ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the observation was made */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month when the observation was made */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the observation was made */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature recorded for the day */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "slp" REAL /* Sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation in mm */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in km */,
  "wind_velocity" REAL /* Average wind velocity in km/h */,
  "wind_magnitude" REAL /* Wind magnitude (e.g., gusts) in km/h */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type (e.g., Rain, Snow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("weather_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the observation station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the category (e.g., Celsius, hPa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., Daily, Hourly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency of data collection */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval between data collections in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "weather_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type (e.g., Rain, Snow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation this metadata is related to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata (e.g., notes, special conditions) */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station making the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time for which the forecast is made */,
  "predicted_temperature" REAL /* Predicted temperature for the date */,
  "predicted_precipitation" REAL /* Predicted precipitation for the date */,
  "predicted_weather_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_predicted_weather_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_weather_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("weather_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station issuing the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of weather alert (e.g., Severe Weather, Flood) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was issued */,
  "issued_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was issued */,
  "expires_date" TEXT /* Date the alert expires */,
  "expires_time" TEXT /* Time the alert expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station for which the data applies */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the historical data */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the month */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation for the month */,
  "avg_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_sources" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was exported */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
